message:
Enhance proposal with technical depth, optimizations, and edge cases

Major enhancements to the automated GitHub review proposal:

- Add ntm velocity thresholds (10.0/2.0/1.0 chars/sec) and hysteresis
- Add Claude Code stream-json event formats and AskUserQuestion detection
- Add detailed priority scoring algorithm with Bash implementation
- Add performance optimizations: GraphQL batching, caching, pre-fetching
- Add exponential backoff with jitter for retries
- Add session recovery with checkpointing
- Add security considerations (token storage, rate limit tracking)
- Add metrics collection and learning from decisions
- Add real-world edge cases (stale issues, duplicates, hostile users,
  scope creep, PRs with good ideas but bad code, security vulns)
- Add enhanced TUI designs with accessibility considerations
- Add comprehensive appendices (command reference, config, glossary)

Document grew from 1604 to 2136 lines with actionable implementation
details.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
